CVE-2023-38545.title: curl SOCKS5 heap buffer overflow
CVE-2023-38545.description: This flaw makes curl overflow a heap based buffer in the SOCKS5 proxy handshake.

CVE-2024-2398.title: curl HTTP/2 push headers memory-leak
CVE-2024-2398.description: When an application tells libcurl it wants to allow HTTP/2 server push, and the server sends push headers, libcurl may experience a memory leak.
